source.author: SSA Catalog
source.notes: A glossy sweet-heat drizzle for shawarma wraps/bowls: honey + citrus + chili with warm spice.

ingredients.label: Orange juice
notes: Adds round sweetness; sub: more lemon juice + a bit more honey.

ingredients.label: Apple cider vinegar
notes: Sub: white vinegar or red wine vinegar.

ingredients.label: Chili paste (sambal oelek or similar)
notes: Adjust to heat tolerance. Sub: hot sauce (reduce liquid elsewhere).

ingredients.label: Crushed red pepper flakes
notes: Optional for extra heat and texture (about 1/2 tsp).

ingredients.label: Garlic powder
notes: About 1/2 teaspoon. Sub: 1 small grated clove (stronger).

ingredients.label: Smoked paprika
notes: About 1/2 teaspoon; optional but adds shawarma-friendly warmth.

ingredients.label: Olive oil
notes: Optional; rounds the finish and adds sheen.

steps.title: Combine
instructions: In a small bowl (no-cook option) or small saucepan (warm option), combine honey, lemon juice, orange juice, apple cider vinegar, chili paste, optional red pepper flakes, garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, and salt.

steps.title: No-cook drizzle (fastest)
instructions: Whisk vigorously until smooth and glossy.
Let stand 5 minutes so the chili and spices bloom.

steps.title: Warm drizzle (best texture)
instructions: Optional: Warm on low heat for 2–4 minutes, stirring constantly. Do not boil.
Remove from heat and whisk until smooth. This helps the drizzle emulsify and thicken slightly.

steps.title: Finish
instructions: Whisk in olive oil (optional) for a smoother, rounder finish and extra sheen.
Taste and adjust: more honey for sweeter, more lemon/vinegar for tangier, more chili for hotter, more salt for pop.

steps.title: Cool and store
instructions: Cool to room temperature before sealing if you warmed it.
Store refrigerated in a sealed container or squeeze bottle. Shake/stir before use.
Use within 2–3 weeks (honey-based drizzles keep well when kept cold and clean).
